UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2018 NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT-UNLIMITED CIVIL JURISDICTION - CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2018 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE COURT'S INSTRUCTIONS, AND AT THE REQUEST OF DENIS KLAVDIANOS, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SALECYCLE, INC., A CORPORATION.
